name: Tromeroi Goneis
overview:
Natalia and Stefanos, Stefanos and Natalia, are a modern couple amidst madness, anxieties, and everyday life. They are around 45, married and balance family life and professional obligations while always keeping the flame of their love burning!

Stefanos was a screenwriter and Natalia was an executive at a travel agency. parents, friends, neighbors and most importantly they have children… Three boys who make their lives difficult and happy. Thomas, who is in high school and must slowly get serious, Hermes who when they get a call from school, they tremble for what they will hear again, and little Alex whose intelligence often becomes dangerous.

Raising three children is not an easy task, but we are not dealing with a random couple either. We trust them, they will do great things. We're talking about... Terrible parents!
